title: hephaestus-storyboard-page-hpsp01
prompt: Use the reference image as the establishing WIDE shot of a scene. Render ONE image laid out as a clean 3x2 grid of six comic storyboard panels with thin black borders and white gutters between them. Each panel is a DIFFERENT camera setup of this SAME scene, character, set, and art style. Panels: (A) wide establishing of the cavernous automaton workshop; (B) medium on the bearded robed figure (Hephaestus) at the assembly line; (C) close-up on Hephaestus's weary bearded face; (D) low tracking shot down the long line of gold automata receding into depth; (E) close-up on a single gold automaton's serene face under a sparking robotic welder; (F) low angle looking up at the tangle of robotic arms and machinery overhead. Keep the SAME character, gold automata, cool blue and purple industrial palette, and concept-art rendering across every panel. Beneath each panel, in the white gutter, print a capital letter label: A, B, C, D, E, F.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Match the exact art style, palette, color, rendering technique, line quality, and medium of the reference image — reproduce its look precisely across every panel. Do not introduce any style not present in the reference.
